summary: P2 Feature 2: Sequences Dashboard UI - All components tested and verified working
feature_tested: Sequences Dashboard UI - card-based dashboard for viewing and managing email sequences

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts library warning when chart containers have no data

dashboard_endpoint.details: Returns 2 built-in sequences (client-onboarding and quote-followup) with correct structure

enrollments_endpoint.details: Returns empty enrollments array for test user

preview_step_1.details: Returns subject='Welcome! Let's Get Started' and HTML preview

preview_step_2.details: Returns portal guide email with subject containing 'Portal'

preview_step_3.details: Returns update reminder email with subject containing 'Progress'

auth_required.details: All 5 endpoints return 401 without valid auth token

sequences_view_accessible.details: view-sequences button in toolbar switches to Sequences Dashboard

stats_bar_renders.details: StatsBar shows 4 cards: Total Sequences (2), Active (1), Emails This Week (0), Clients Enrolled (0)

sequence_cards_render.details: Two built-in sequence cards displayed with correct info

detail_modal.details: Details button opens modal showing Sequence Flow with 3 steps and Enrolled Clients section

email_preview.details: Preview Email button opens overlay with rendered HTML email template

custom_sequences_section.details: 'Coming Soon' section renders at bottom with disabled button

critical_code_review_comments: All P2 Feature 2 components implemented correctly
Dashboard endpoints properly separated from CRUD endpoints to avoid route conflicts
Stats correctly count totalSequences=2 and activeSequences=1
Email preview templates include personalization placeholders ([Client Name]) and studio name
Sequence cards show step preview with day delays (Day 0, Day 2, Day 7 for onboarding)
Detail modal correctly fetches enrollments and displays empty state
Toggle functionality for client-onboarding works (quote-followup disabled per design)
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 Feature 2 (Sequences Dashboard UI) fully verified: All dashboard endpoints working, frontend renders stats bar with 4 metrics, 2 built-in sequence cards display correctly, detail modal shows sequence flow and enrolled clients, email preview renders HTML templates. Test account: test@test.com / Test123456!. Minor console warning about Recharts chart dimensions when no data (not blocking).

feature_summary.feature_2_sequences_dashboard: COMPLETE - All verification points passed: Dashboard returns 2 sequences, stats endpoint returns 4 metrics, toggle works, enrollments endpoint returns array, all 3 email previews work, frontend renders all components correctly
